/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/TextARPG.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TextARPG.dir/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TextARPG.dir/attackable_entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TextARPG.dir/combat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TextARPG.dir/game_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TextARPG.dir/session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TextARPG.dir/player_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TextARPG.dir/room.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TextARPG.dir/player_store.cpp.o -o TextARPG  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so
